2604.26991.title: People-Centred Medical Image Analysis
2604.26991.paper_summary: Recent advances in data-centric medical AI have produced highly accurate diagnostic systems, but the emphasis on data curation and performance metrics has not translated into widespread clinical adoption. We conjecture that this limited uptake stems from insufficient attention dedicated to the optimisation of fair performance across diverse patient populations and to workflow integration: performance biases can create regulatory barriers, and poorly integrated automation can disrupt clinical routines, degrade the quality of human-AI collaboration, and reduce clinicians' willingness to adopt AI tools. Prior work on workflow integration (e.g., Learning to Defer (L2D) and Learning to Complement (L2C)) and AI fairness has typically examined these challenges in isolation, overlooking their natural interdependence and the practical constraints of clinical environments, such as restricted clinician availability. We propose People-Centred Medical Image Analysis (PecMan), a human-AI framework that jointly optimises fairness, diagnostic accuracy, and workflow effectiveness through a dynamic gating mechanism that assigns cases to AI, clinicians, or both under clinician workload constraints. We also introduce the Fairness and Human-Centred AI (FairHAI) benchmark for evaluating trade-offs between accuracy, fairness, and clinician workload. Experiments using this benchmark show that PecMan consistently outperforms existing methods, paving the way for more trustworthy and clinically viable AI systems. Code will be available upon paper acceptance.
2604.26991.paper_summary_zh: 最近在以數據為中心的醫療人工智慧方面的進展，已經產生了高度準確的診斷系統，但對數據整理和性能指標的重視並未轉化為廣泛的臨床採用。我們推測，這種有限的採用源於對於在多樣化病人群體中優化公平性能和工作流程整合的關注不足：性能偏差可能會造成監管障礙，而整合不良的自動化可能會擾亂臨床例行程序，降低人類與人工智慧的合作質量，並減少臨床醫生採用人工智慧工具的意願。先前關於工作流程整合（例如，學習延遲（L2D）和學習補充（L2C））和人工智慧公平性的研究通常是孤立地檢視這些挑戰，忽略了它們之間的自然相互依賴性以及臨床環境的實際限制，如臨床醫生的可用性有限。我們提出了以人為中心的醫療影像分析（PecMan），這是一個人類與人工智慧的框架，通過一個動態閘控機制，在臨床醫生的工作負荷限制下，聯合優化公平性、診斷準確性和工作流程有效性，將案例分配給人工智慧、臨床醫生或兩者。我們還引入了公平性與以人為中心的人工智慧（FairHAI）基準，用於評估準確性、公平性和臨床醫生工作負荷之間的權衡。使用這一基準的實驗顯示，PecMan始終優於現有方法，為更可靠和臨床可行的人工智慧系統鋪平了道路。代碼將在論文接受後提供。
2604.26991.author: Zheng Zhang et.al.
2604.26991.authors: Zheng Zhang, Milad Masroor, Cuong Nguyen, Tahir Hassan, Yuanhong Chen, David Rosewarne, Kevin Wells, Thanh-Toan Do, Gustavo Carneiro
